title: Oracle Fusion Cloud Invoice
description: An accounts payable invoice in Oracle Fusion Cloud ERP representing a financial obligation to a supplier for goods or services received, including header information, line items, and payment details.

InvoiceId.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the invoice

InvoiceAmount.description: Total invoice amount in the invoice currency

InvoiceCurrencyCode.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the invoice amount

InvoiceDate.description: Date of the invoice as provided by the supplier

VendorName.description: Name of the supplier who issued the invoice

VendorNumber.description: Unique supplier number in the system

VendorSiteCode.description: Supplier site from which the invoice originates

BusinessUnit.description: Business unit responsible for the invoice

DueDate.description: Date by which payment is due

AccountingDate.description: Date used for accounting and period determination

ApprovalStatus.description: Current status in the approval workflow

ValidationStatus.description: Validation status indicating whether the invoice passed validation checks

PaidAmount.description: Amount already paid against this invoice

CreatedBy.description: Username of the person who created the invoice

CreationDate.description: Timestamp when the invoice record was created

LastUpdateDate.description: Timestamp when the invoice was last modified
